title: Henry VIII of England becomes king of England
fact: Henry VIII was King of England from 22 April 1509 until his death in 1547.

title: Elizabeth I of England becomes queen of England
fact: Elizabeth I was Queen of England and Ireland from 17 November 1558 until her death in 1603.

title: James VI and I becomes king of England
fact: James VI and I was King of Scotland as James VI from 24 July 1567, and King of England and Ireland as James I from the union of the Scottish and English crowns on 24 March 1603, until his death in 1625.

title: Charles I of England becomes king of England
fact: Charles I was King of England, Scotland, and Ireland from 27 March 1625 until his execution in 1649.

title: Anne of Great Britain becomes queen of England
fact: Anne was Queen of England, Scotland, and Ireland from 8 March 1702, and Queen of Great Britain and Ireland following the ratification of the Acts of Union 1707 merging the kingdoms of England and Scotland, until her death in 1714.

title: Charles II of England becomes king of England
fact: Charles II was King of Scotland from 1649 until 1651 and King of England, Scotland, and Ireland from the 1660 Restoration of the monarchy until his death in 1685.

title: Richard III of England becomes king of England
fact: Richard III was King of England from 26 June 1483 until his death in 1485.

title: Henry VII of England becomes king of England
fact: Henry VII, also known as Henry Tudor, was King of England and Lord of Ireland from his seizure of the crown on 22 August 1485 until his death in 1509.

title: Mary I becomes queen of England
fact: Mary I, also known as Mary Tudor, was Queen of England and Ireland from July 1553 and Queen of Spain as the wife of King Philip II from January 1556 until her death in 1558.

title: William the Conqueror becomes king of England
fact: William the Conqueror, sometimes called William the Bastard, was the first Norman king of England, reigning from 1066 until his death.

title: Henry V of England becomes king of England
fact: Henry V, also called Henry of Monmouth, was King of England from 1413 until his death in 1422.

title: Lady Jane Grey becomes queen of England
fact: Lady Jane Grey, also known as Lady Jane Dudley after her marriage, and nicknamed as the "Nine Days Queen", was an English noblewoman who was proclaimed Queen of England and Ireland on 10 July 1553 and reigned until she was deposed by the Privy Council of England, which proclaimed her cousin, Mary I, as the new Queen on 19 July.

title: Henry VI of England becomes king of England
fact: Henry VI was King of England from 1422 to 1461 and again from 1470 to 1471, and claimant to the French throne from 1422 to 1453 under the terms of the Treaty of Troyes.

title: Richard I of England becomes king of England
fact: Richard I, known as Richard the Lionheart or Richard Cœur de Lion because of his reputation as a great military leader and warrior, was King of England from 1189 until his death in 1199.

title: Edward VI of England becomes king of England
fact: Edward VI was King of England and Ireland from 28 January 1547 until his death in 1553.

title: James II of England becomes king of England
fact: James II and VII was King of England and Ireland as James II and King of Scotland as James VII from February 1685 until he was deposed in the 1688 Glorious Revolution.

title: Alfred the Great becomes king of England
fact: Alfred the Great was King of the West Saxons from 871 to 886, and King of the Anglo-Saxons from 886 until his death in 899.

title: John, King of England becomes king of England
fact: John was King of England from 1199 until his death in 1216.

title: Henry II of England becomes king of England
fact: Henry II was King of England from 1154 until his death in 1189.

title: Edward IV of England becomes king of England
fact: Edward IV was King of England from 4 March 1461 to 3 October 1470, then again from 11 April 1471 until his death in 1483.

title: Edward III of England becomes king of England
fact: Edward III, also known as Edward of Windsor before accession, was King of England from January 1327 until his death in 1377.

title: Henry IV of England becomes king of England
fact: Henry IV, also known as Henry Bolingbroke, was King of England from 1399 to 1413, Lord of Ireland and duke of Aquitaine.

title: Edward II of England becomes king of England
fact: Edward II, also known as Edward of Caernarfon or Caernarvon, was King of England from 1307 until he was deposed in January 1327.

title: William III of England becomes king of England
fact: William III and II, also known as William of Orange, was the sovereign Prince of Orange from birth, Stadtholder of Holland, Zeeland, Utrecht, Guelders, and Overijssel in the Dutch Republic from 1672, and King of England, Ireland, and Scotland from 1689 until his death in 1702.

title: Edward I of England becomes king of England
fact: Edward I, also known as Edward Longshanks and the Hammer of the Scots, was King of England from 1272 to 1307.

title: Edward the Confessor becomes king of England
fact: Edward the Confessor was King of the English from 1042 until his death in 1066.

title: Henry III of England becomes king of England
fact: Henry III, also known as Henry of Winchester, was King of England, Lord of Ireland and Duke of Aquitaine from 1216 until his death in 1272.

title: Henry I of England becomes king of England
fact: Henry I, also known as Henry Beauclerc, was King of England from 1100 to his death in 1135.

title: Harold Godwinson becomes king of England
fact: Harold Godwinson, also called Harold II, was the last crowned Anglo-Saxon king of England.

title: Æthelstan becomes king of England
fact: Æthelstan or Athelstan was King of the Anglo-Saxons from 924 to 927 and King of the English from 927 to his death in 939.

title: Richard II of England becomes king of England
fact: Richard II, also known as Richard of Bordeaux, was King of England from 1377 until he was deposed in 1399.

title: Cnut the Great becomes king of England
fact: Cnut, also known as Canute and with the epithet the Great, was King of England from 1016, King of Denmark from 1018, and King of Norway from 1028 until his death in 1035.

title: Edward V of England becomes king of England
fact: Edward V was King of England from 9 April to 25 June 1483.

title: Mary II of England becomes queen of England
fact: Mary II was Queen of England, Scotland, and Ireland with her husband, King William III and II, from 1689 until her death in 1694.

title: Stephen, King of England becomes king of England
fact: Stephen, often referred to as Stephen of Blois, was King of England from 22 December 1135 to his death in 1154.

title: Edward the Elder becomes king of England
fact: Edward the Elder was King of the Anglo-Saxons from 899 until his death in 924.

title: Æthelred the Unready becomes king of England
fact: Æthelred II, known as Æthelred the Unready, was King of the English from March 978 to December 1013 and again from February 1014 until his death.

title: William II of England becomes king of England
fact: William II was King of England from 26 September 1087 until his death in 1100, with powers over Normandy and influence in Scotland.

title: Harthacanute becomes king of England
fact: Harthacnut was King of Denmark from 1035, and King of England from 1040 until his death in 1042.

title: Edmund I becomes king of England
fact: Edmund I or Eadmund I was King of the English from 27 October 939 until his death in 946.

title: Edward the Martyr becomes king of England
fact: Edward the Martyr was King of the English from 8 July 975 until he was killed in 978.

title: Edgar of England becomes king of England
fact: Edgar, also known as Edgar the Peaceful, the Peacemaker and the Peaceable, was King of the English from 959 until his death in 975.

title: Eadwig becomes king of England
fact: Eadwig was King of England from 23 November 955 until his death in 959.

title: Edred of England becomes king of England
fact: Eadred was King of the English from 26 May 946 until his death in 955.

title: Edmund II of England becomes king of England
fact: Edmund Ironside was King of the English from 23 April to 30 November 1016.

title: Sweyn I of Denmark becomes king of England
fact: Swein Forkbeard was King of Denmark from 986, King of England for five weeks from December 1013, and King of Norway from 999/1000, all until his death in 1014.

title: Harold Harefoot becomes king of England
fact: Harold I, commonly known as Harold Harefoot, was King of England from 1037 to 1040.
